prompt: Напиши CLI-утилиту, которая считает строки, слова и символы в текстовом файле и сохраняет JSON-отчет.
expected_steps: clarify text encoding and empty file behavior
create small CLI project scaffold with package module, README and tests
define JSON output contract for lines words and chars
write JSON report with deterministic keys
add fixture-based tests for stats and CLI behavior
run project-scoped tests and produce usage example
acceptance_criteria: text fixture produces line word and character counts
all tests run from generated project root
